name: Elara Moonwhisper
description: *A young woman in elegant robes studies a spellbook intently, arcane energy crackling faintly around her fingertips.*

recruitment.success_text: Elara closes her spellbook with a determined smile. 'Finally! A chance to put my magical training to good use! Lead the way!'

initial: *A young mage looks up from her arcane studies*
Oh! You have quite the interesting magical aura about you.
I sense you're involved in something important... and dangerous.
How fascinating! I do love a good magical mystery!
pre_mayor: I'd love to help, but the Mayor has strict rules about magic users.
Ever since the... incidents... he requires official approval for any expeditions.
Get his blessing first, then we can discuss proper magical support!
post_mayor: The Mayor told me about the disappearances - definitely magical in nature!
I've been researching similar cases in my grimoires.
You'll need a skilled spellcaster to counter whatever dark magic is at work!
post_recruitment: *studies your other party members with keen interest*
What an excellent balance of skills we have!
With my magic backing your martial prowess, we should succeed.
I have some new spells I'm eager to test in the field!
party_full: Four is the perfect number according to adventuring theory!
Too many causes magical interference, too few lacks tactical options.
already_recruited: My magic is ready to serve our cause!
Where shall we direct our magical investigations?
